utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 keys. Now check if each is fully specified per the requirement (each item must include the coverage type and costs; total_budget must include complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). 1) health_coverage: specifies health insurance, includes cost (€110/month). Meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides equipment insurance for photography gear, not home/contents. While it includes a cost (€60/month), it does not match the requested type (home/contents). Not fully specified as per format. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with costs (€50/month). Meets requirement. 4) additional_services: provides enhancement services with costs (€50/month). Meets requirement. 5) total_budget: asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan gives monthly total and mentions annual savings but does not provide total annual cost amount. That is incomplete for a full annual breakdown. Therefore, items fully specified: health_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services = 3 out of 5.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item in the final coverage plan to the exact item names present in the ground-truth ratings and return their numeric ratings. The final plan lists: (1) HealthFirst Standard Health Insurance. In the ground truth under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, the exact name is 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' with rating 7. (2) VitalPlus Equipment Insurance for photography equipment up to €3,000. In ground truth under property_protection.home_content, the closest matching product line is 'VitalPlus Standard Coverage' (same brand and role for home/equipment coverage) with rating 7. (3) InsurePlus Travel/Adventure Insurance. In ground truth under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, the exact item is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' with rating 10. (4) InsurePlus Professional Liability Insurance. Professional liability is not listed in ground-truth categories except possibly implied in ideal profile, but there is no explicit rating entry for professional liability insurance. Therefore, there is no matching item name to map; we must omit unrated items from RATINGS and include only those that have exact names in the ground truth. Total budget line is not an insurance product and has no rating.
